ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic group */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Estimated population size of the demographic group */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death_types" (
  "death_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of death */,
  "death_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type of death */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type of death */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of death (e.g., natural, accident, homicide) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality rate entry */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic group */,
  "death_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of death */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate as a percentage */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the mortality rate estimate */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the mortality rate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_death_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("death_type_id") REFERENCES death_types ("death_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES demographic_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., mortality rate, demographic data) */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Name of the data quality metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES demographic_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES mortality_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization that maintains the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
